settings.heading:
Dressed for the
story she becomes
settings.subheading: Bridal couture conceived in Mumbai, worn across the world

settings.quote: “Every length of silk, every stitch of zari — held to the light of the woman who will wear it.”
settings.body: We are a Mumbai atelier dedicated to the art of bridal dressing. Each piece begins as a conversation and ends as an heirloom — shaped by the woman, never imposed upon her.

settings.heading: The bride before the moment — in her own words
settings.body: Our Client Diaries series captures the relationship between a woman and her wedding wardrobe — not as a transaction, but as a rite. Here, real brides speak about the garments that held them on the most important day of their lives.

settings.heading: Four centuries of craft in every garment
settings.intro: Our studio in Mumbai brings together master craftspeople from across India. Each piece is constructed by hand, through processes refined over generations.
settings.step_1_desc: Each piece is embroidered by hand — zari, zardozi, and thread-work applied stitch by stitch under natural light.
settings.step_2_desc: We source silks, organzas, and velvets from Banaras, Kanchipuram and Surat — selecting only what passes the hand-feel test.
settings.step_3_desc: Every silhouette begins on the body, not on paper. Our drapers work directly with the cloth until the fall is exactly right.
settings.step_4_desc: We insist on at least two in-person fittings. The garment is adjusted to the bride, not the other way around.

settings.heading: What our clients say
settings.review_1_quote: I have never felt more myself than in my K&A lehenga. They understood exactly what I wanted — and gave me something more beautiful than I had imagined.
settings.review_2_quote: The attention to detail was extraordinary. Every fitting felt like they were building the garment around me as a person. Worth every rupee and every moment.
settings.review_3_quote: I wore K&A for all four of my wedding events. Every outfit was magnificent. Guests are still talking about the reception lehenga. True artisanship.

settings.heading: Begin your bridal story. Book a private appointment.
settings.body: Our studio appointments are intimate, unhurried, and completely personal. Meet Karishma and Ashita — and begin the journey toward your wedding wardrobe.

settings.heading: Letters from the atelier
settings.body: New collections, behind-the-scenes from the studio, and invitations to private events — for those who follow closely.
settings.privacy_note: Curated, infrequent. We respect your inbox.

settings.tagline: An atelier devoted to the Indian bridal woman — her beauty, her joy, her story. Every garment is a collaboration between craft and the woman who wears it.
